title: Chicken Jockey (Zombie Variants Compat)
description: Inspired by 'A Minecraft Movie', this mod makes baby zombies seek out nearby chickens so they can become jockeys.
body:
**Requires [Zombie Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/zombie-variants) and [Chicken Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/chickenjockey)**

Inspired by 'A Minecraft Movie', this mod makes baby zombies seek out nearby chickens so they can become jockeys. Zombies, zombie villagers, husks, and zombie piglins are all supported!

## Other Jockey Mods
- [Bedrock Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-jockey)
- [Dolphin Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/dolphin-jockey)
- [Spider Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/spider-jockey)
